arts.sum: Those problems continued over the summer but Mount was highlighted as someone for new manager Ruben Amorim to turn to in his 3-4-3/3-4-2-1 system that Thomas Tuchel used to great effect at Chelsea . Mount only played 20 times in his first season at the club, scoring a single goal.

arts.sum: Chelsea selected Adarabioyo on Thursday away to Astana in the Conference League. Instead of the Frenchman, Enzo Maresca turned to Tosin Adarabioyo at the heart of defence.

arts.sum: Chelsea reportedly identify Borussia Dortmund goalkeeper Gregor Kobel as a potential successor to Robert Sanchez, whom the jury is still out on.

arts.ttl: Liverpool and Man City target AMBITIOUS Chelsea transfer
arts.sum: Liverpool are in the market for a new right-back amid concerns that Trent Alexander-Arnold will leave the club on a free transfer next summer, and Gusto has reportedly emerged as a target for Arne Slot’s side. The France defender has impressed since moving to Stamford Bridge last summer and he is currently Enzo Maresca’s first choice right-back amid Reece James’ significant injury struggles.
